name: orangutan_chr20_centromere
description: Pongo abelii chr20 centromere / pericentromere. Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array; 13-monomer HOR unit (~2223 bp). T2T-resolved alpha-sat array; flanked by ape-lineage PongoSAT satellite blocks. Centromere mapping is HOR-aware; LLmap should refuse to silently collapse cross-species divergence here.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers in 13-mer HOR units, tandemly arrayed over 2.1 Mb
